return(function(z,i,c,U,m,Y,w,F,d,y,B,C,v,A,a,u,E,N,j,J,h,S)S,h,N,v,u,y,J,E,C,B,a,A,F,d,j={},function(z,V)local i=E(V)local c=function(c,U,m,Y)return u(z,{c;U;m;Y},V,i)end return c end,{},function(z,V)local i=E(V)local c=function(c,U,m,Y,w)return u(z,{c;U;m;Y;w},V,i)end return c end,function(u,c,U,m)local EF={}local
